resources.string: Tap Stop to stop camera assistance.
Alerts you if camera assistance was stopped by the phone.
Open Akshrava and press Start assistance again. Keep using your cane.
Configure once with a volunteer, then press Start assistance.
Starting assistance. You can now lock the screen.
A volunteer must enter a WSS endpoint, device token, and calibration ID.
Camera permission is required to start assistance.
Notification permission is required for visible assistance controls.
Device Keystore unavailable. Re-provision the token with a volunteer; it was not saved in plaintext.
